questions.q: In a major shift of its postwar pacifist policy, which country lifted its ban on lethal weapons exports in April 2026?
Why did authorities in Western Australia recently withdraw approximately 2,000 traffic fines?
options: Due to errors generated by AI road safety cameras
The speed limit signs were printed incorrectly
The traffic cameras were installed without legal permits
A hacker altered the camera system's database
questions.correctText: Due to errors generated by AI road safety cameras

questions.q: Published on April 20, 2026, the largest U.S. study tracking over 11,000 children concluded that teen cannabis use is distinctly linked to what developmental issue?
In a major leadership transition announced on April 20, 2026, what new role will Apple's Tim Cook assume after stepping down as CEO?
In April 2026, Apple announced that Tim Cook will step down as CEO later in the year. Who has been confirmed to take his place?
Hungarian Prime Minister-elect Peter Magyar recently stated that his government would honor an ICC warrant and arrest which world leader if he visits?

On April 21, 2026, scientists analyzing data from NASA's Curiosity Mars rover revealed the discovery of an organic, DNA-precursor molecule containing which element, marking a first for the red planet?
Which university's student was recently arrested by the FBI for taking unauthorized photographs of US military planes?
On April 20, 2026, regulatory filings revealed that General Motors lured their new product chief with a pay package totaling up to $40 million. What is his name? [1.6]
Ontario Premier Doug Ford recently defended the purchase of a new private jet by pointing out that Quebec bought three jets. According to the Quebec government, what are those jets actually used for?
